primary.rationale: Pretendard is the de-facto Korean-product UI font (Toss, Naver, Coupang, Wanted all ship variants). Jumpit's developer-recruitment audience expects this familiar Hangul reading experience; no proprietary display face is layered on top.

display._note: No separate display/brand font. The 32/700 hero card title and 24/700 section heads use Pretendard Variable at the same axis as body.

weight_policy.400_body: Default reading weight across body, links, filter-chip rest state.
weight_policy.500_secondary_emphasis: Used sparingly — observed 12× across positions surface (≈12% of samples).
weight_policy.700_brand_heading_active: Headings (24/700, 32/700), the single primary CTA (15/700), active filter chips (16/700), and the Notice eyebrow (13/700). No 600 in between — emphasis is binary.
